column1: # grep-tells.tsv — TIER 1 (flat-presence) rules for audit-swiftui-touch-gestures (tg-01 … tg-11).
# severity: hard | warn | adv   (hard → runner exits 2). The runner greps each ERE over the target *.swift.
# This LOCATES only — the LLM agent READS each hit (SKILL.md step 3) and decides. Absence defects
# (tg-06 missing accessibilityAction, tg-07 missing contextMenu, tg-11 missing refreshable) are located by
# surfacing interactive-view / gesture CANDIDATES; the agent judges absence after READ. Structural rules
# grep cannot express (macOS-arm gate scope, gesture co-occurrence) live in ast-grep/*.yml (tier 2).

column4: DEPRECATED → MagnifyGesture (iOS 17, at the floor → no gate). Owns the rewrite mechanics; cross_ref api-currency for the flag (tg-01).
DEPRECATED → RotateGesture (iOS 17, at the floor → no gate). Owns the rewrite mechanics; cross_ref api-currency for the flag (tg-02).
continuous gesture — READ it: if it has no @GestureState (nor a committed @State written in .onChanged/.updating), the in-flight value is lost (tg-03).

plain .gesture — if attached to a control that already has a built-in gesture (Button/Slider/ScrollView/List row), it may swallow it → .simultaneousGesture / .highPriorityGesture (tg-04, verify against Xcode 26 SDK).

pointer-only affordance — READ it: .onHover/onContinuousHover/pointerStyle never fire from a finger. If it is the ONLY interaction (no tap/gesture fallback) the view is dead on iPhone (tg-05). cross_ref ios-idiomaticness.

custom touch gesture CANDIDATE — READ it: a bare onTapGesture/onLongPressGesture on a plain view with NO .accessibilityAction (and no Button/NavigationLink) is unreachable by VoiceOver (tg-06). cross_ref accessibility.
row/item container CANDIDATE — READ it: if a row has secondary actions but NO touch-and-hold .contextMenu, the iOS idiom is missing (tg-07).
pointerStyle has NO iOS arm (macOS/visionOS only) — platform-wrong on iOS. Replace with a touch interaction; an #available(iOS …) wrapper cannot conjure it (tg-08). fix_mode: flag.
swipe-to-act is a hidden iOS idiom — if it is the ONLY path to a row's secondary actions, also expose them in a touch-and-hold .contextMenu (tg-10).

scrollable container CANDIDATE — READ it: if it lists async/remote data and has NO .refreshable, the pull-to-refresh idiom is missing (tg-11, UNVERIFIED judgment — a static/local list should not refresh).
